summary: Update mode testing after Google Sheets integration for contacts. Updated 2 backend tests and the dismissToasts helper to match new behavior. All 20 backend + 40 frontend tests pass.
seed_data_creation: Backend contact tests now create TEST_ entries in Google Sheets with no cleanup (no delete API). Gallery test data is still cleaned up via DELETE endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Sheets integration fully working. Contacts are written to and read from Google Sheets. No contact delete/mark-as-read endpoints exist. dismissToasts helper uses .first() to avoid strict mode violations with multiple toasts. All other functionality unchanged.
rca_of_issue: 2 backend tests failed due to Google Sheets integration: (1) test_contact_has_required_fields asserted is_read in POST /api/contact response - ContactSubmission model has no is_read field (only added by GET /admin/contacts). (2) test_admin_can_mark_contact_read called PUT /api/admin/contacts/{id}/read which was removed. 1 frontend test (admin logout) failed due to dismissToasts strict mode violation when 2 toasts (login+logout) appeared simultaneously - fixed by adding .first() to the locator.
